pushSetup.unsupported: Your browser does not support push notifications.
pushSetup.locationExplain: To receive notifications about events in your area. Your browser will ask — click
pushSetup.locationDenied: Location access is denied. You can add locations manually in the "Saved Locations" section below in Settings.
pushSetup.pushExplain: To receive alerts even when the page is closed. Your browser will ask — click
pushSetup.pushDenied: Notifications are blocked. Enable them in your browser settings (lock icon in the address bar).

hero.title: Know what's happening around you
hero.subtitle: Weather warnings, traffic closures, air quality alerts — delivered to your phone before they affect you.

features.title: Everything that matters, in one place
features.subtitle: One app replaces five. Hyperlocal alerts powered by your exact location.

weather.title: Weather Warnings
weather.description: Storms, heavy wind, frost and other meteorological warnings.

traffic.title: Traffic Updates
traffic.description: Closures, accidents and congestion near you in real time.

airQuality.title: Air Quality
airQuality.description: Smog, particulates and allergens. Know when to stay indoors.

outages.title: Utility Outages
outages.description: Planned outages of electricity, water, gas and heat in your area.

location.title: Location-Smart
location.description: Everything works automatically based on where you are right now.

howItWorks.title: Get started in 3 steps
howItWorks.subtitle: No sign-up forms, no city selection.

step1.title: Install the app
step1.description: Download Notifio from the App Store or Google Play.

step2.title: Allow your location
step2.description: The app detects where you are and filters alerts for your area.

step3.title: Get notified
step3.description: Push notifications alert you about what's happening around you.

cta.title: Ready to stay informed?
cta.subtitle: Download Notifio and never be caught off guard again.
